meaning: vt.刺,戳,刺痛,竖起vi.刺,竖起n.扎,一刺,刺痛,锥,阴茎adj.竖起的
examples: Prick holes in the paper with a pin.
The roses are thorny. Take care not to prick your hands.
You will feel a tiny prick in your arm.
Prick the sausage, put it in a small baking pan, and bake for 20 minutes.
But checking levels involves a painful finger-prick test, which deters many from carrying out the test.
